title: Memory Write Contract
description: FR-VID-12 §4 Stage 4 — Canonical rules for writing project/composition/production/review/learning memory objects. Defines the memory domain, object type, schema path, lifecycle trigger, and validation requirement.

memory_domain.description: The .cmf/memory/ subdirectory this object is written to.

object_type.description: Canonical memory object type name (e.g. project_profile, composition_fingerprint, scene_decision_log, review_packet, pattern_card).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this memory object captures.

schema_path.description: Relative path to the JSON Schema that validates this memory object.

lifecycle_trigger.description: The lifecycle event that triggers this memory write.

validation_required.description: Whether the memory object must pass schema validation before persistence. If true and validation fails, the run ends with a warning or block depending on profile.

written_by.description: Agent types that write this memory object.

persisted_at_pattern.description: Glob pattern for the filesystem path where this object is persisted (e.g. .cmf/memory/composition/*.json).
